name: Empress Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, sift together the cake flour, Ghirardelli Sweet Ground Chocolate, sugar, baking soda, cream of tartar, and salt.
3. Add the shortening and 3/4 cup buttermilk to the dry ingredients. Mix on low speed until combined.
4. Increase the speed to medium-low and mix for an additional 2 minutes.
5. Stir in the remaining 1/4 cup buttermilk, eggs, and vanilla. Mix again for another 2 minutes.
6. Line two 8-inch round cake pans with wax paper.
7. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pans.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow the cakes to cool on wire racks for about 10 minutes before removing them from the pans.
After completely cooled, frost with Empress Frosting.
separate recipe
Source: Recipes from Ghirardelli Chocolate Company of San Francisco; recipe from box of "Sweet Ground Chocolate and Cocoa"
From: Sallie Austin
